title: TypeScript / JavaScript project configuration
description: Configuration for the TypeScript compiler (tsconfig.json) or a JavaScript project (jsconfig.json).

extends.description: Path to a base configuration file to inherit from, or an array of such paths (later entries override earlier ones).

files.description: An allowlist of files to include in the program. Errors when any file is missing.

include.description: Glob patterns of files to include in the program.

exclude.description: Glob patterns of files skipped when resolving 'include'.

path.description: Path to a referenced project's directory or tsconfig file.

circular.description: Allow this reference to form a cycle.

watchDirectory.description: Strategy for watching whole directory trees.

fallbackPolling.description: Polling strategy used when file system events are unavailable.

excludeDirectories.description: Directories excluded from the watch process.

excludeFiles.description: Files excluded from the watch process.

module.description: Module code generation for emitted JavaScript.

moduleResolution.description: How module specifiers are resolved to files.

lib.description: Built-in library declaration files included in the compilation.

jsx.description: How JSX in .tsx files is emitted.

jsxImportSource.description: Module specifier for the JSX factory functions when using 'react-jsx'.

strictNullChecks.description: Treat null and undefined as distinct types.

strictFunctionTypes.description: Check function parameters contravariantly when comparing function types.

strictBindCallApply.description: Type-check the arguments of bind, call, and apply.

strictPropertyInitialization.description: Error on class properties declared but not set in the constructor.

strictBuiltinIteratorReturn.description: Type built-in iterator TReturn as undefined instead of any.

noImplicitAny.description: Error on expressions and declarations with an implied 'any' type.

noImplicitThis.description: Error on 'this' expressions with an implied 'any' type.

alwaysStrict.description: Parse in strict mode and emit "use strict" in each file.

useUnknownInCatchVariables.description: Type catch clause variables as 'unknown' instead of 'any'.

esModuleInterop.description: Emit interop helpers so CommonJS modules import cleanly; implies allowSyntheticDefaultImports.

allowSyntheticDefaultImports.description: Allow default imports from modules without a default export (type-checking only).

skipLibCheck.description: Skip type checking of declaration (.d.ts) files.

rootDir.description: Root directory of source files; controls the emitted directory structure.

baseUrl.description: Base directory for resolving non-relative module names.

paths.description: Path mapping entries that re-map imports relative to baseUrl.

types.description: Type package names included globally; limits automatic @types inclusion.

typeRoots.description: Directories treated like ./node_modules/@types for global type packages.

noEmit.description: Type-check only; do not emit output files.

allowJs.description: Allow JavaScript files to be part of the program.

checkJs.description: Report errors in JavaScript files; used with allowJs.

resolveJsonModule.description: Allow importing .json files with generated types.

isolatedModules.description: Ensure each file can be transpiled independently (safe for single-file transpilers).

verbatimModuleSyntax.description: Emit imports/exports exactly as written; requires type-only imports for types.

incremental.description: Save .tsbuildinfo files for faster incremental compilation.

composite.description: Enable constraints so the project can be used with project references.

tsBuildInfoFile.description: Path of the .tsbuildinfo incremental compilation file.

noUncheckedIndexedAccess.description: Add 'undefined' to types read through index signatures.

noImplicitOverride.description: Require the 'override' modifier on members overriding a base class member.

noFallthroughCasesInSwitch.description: Error on switch cases that fall through.

allowImportingTsExtensions.description: Allow imports with .ts/.tsx extensions; requires noEmit or emitDeclarationOnly, or 'rewriteRelativeImportExtensions'.

moduleDetection.description: How the compiler decides whether a file is a module or a script.

customConditions.description: Extra conditions applied when resolving package.json 'exports'/'imports'.

forceConsistentCasingInFileNames.description: Error on imports whose casing differs from the file on disk.

useDefineForClassFields.description: Emit class fields with ECMAScript-standard 'define' semantics.

emitDecoratorMetadata.description: Emit design-type metadata for decorated declarations.
